articles.title: MrBeast fires video editor who allegedly made $4,000 with "near perfect" success on Kalshi
articles.summary: MrBeast fired a video editor after discovering they made $4,000 betting on Kalshi with what sources called "near perfect" success rates. The incident highlights how employees with inside knowledge of content creation timelines and decisions can exploit prediction markets, potentially forcing platforms to tighten insider trading policies.

articles.title: Understanding prediction markets with Louis Pellegrino and Charles Farrell
articles.summary: Louis Pellegrino and Charles Farrell break down how prediction markets actually work, from basic mechanics to advanced trading strategies. Smart money follows the insights of experienced traders who've learned to spot inefficiencies and capitalize on crowd psychology in these markets.

articles.title: Stocktwits Announces 2026 Cashtag Awards Presented by Polymarket, Hosted at the New York Stock Exchange
articles.summary: Stocktwits is partnering with Polymarket to host the 2026 Cashtag Awards at the NYSE, marking another step in prediction markets' march toward mainstream finance. The collaboration signals that traditional financial institutions are warming up to prediction markets as legitimate tools for price discovery and market sentiment analysis.

articles.title: Prediction Markets: The Gamble Disguised as News
articles.summary: Mainstream media is attacking prediction markets as glorified gambling dressed up with fancy economic theory. The criticism threatens regulatory acceptance just as platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi are gaining serious traction with institutional money.

articles.title: Polymarket Gets Major Prediction Completely Wrong After Loudly Boasting About It
articles.summary: Polymarket hyped up their forecasting accuracy on a high-profile event, then completely whiffed when the actual outcome rolled around. The embarrassing miss undermines the platform's credibility pitch just as mainstream adoption hangs on whether prediction markets can actually deliver better forecasts than traditional polling and punditry.

articles.title: Prediction markets are playing a dangerous game
articles.summary: Prediction markets are facing mounting regulatory pressure as lawmakers worry about their influence on elections and potential for manipulation. If regulators crack down hard, we could see major platforms shut down or forced overseas, leaving US bettors with fewer options and less liquidity.

articles.title: Trump regulator splits GOP with prediction market fight
articles.summary: A Trump-appointed regulator is causing internal Republican conflict over how to handle prediction market regulation. The GOP split signals uncertainty about whether prediction markets will face stricter oversight or get the deregulatory treatment that could supercharge the industry.

articles.title: Prediction Markets Are All the Rage, but This AI Stock Is a Much Better Investment
articles.summary: Some finance writer thinks buying AI stocks beats betting on prediction markets right now. The take matters because it shows mainstream media still doesn't grasp that prediction markets aren't just another asset class to trade against - they're information discovery engines that could actually help pick better AI investments.

articles.title: Wall Street Regulators Advance Crypto, Prediction Market Plans
articles.summary: Wall Street regulators are pushing forward new frameworks that would bring both cryptocurrency and prediction markets under clearer federal oversight. This signals Washington is finally ready to legitimize prediction markets as a real financial product, which could unlock institutional money and mainstream adoption for platforms that have operated in regulatory gray zones.

articles.title: Jake Paul's Betr Brings Polymarket To One Million Sports Bettors
articles.summary: Jake Paul's sports betting platform Betr is partnering with Polymarket to expose its one million users to prediction markets beyond traditional sports wagers. This marks the biggest mainstream crossover yet for crypto prediction markets, potentially bringing serious liquidity and legitimacy to political and event betting that has mostly lived in DeFi corners.

articles.title: How Is Kalshi Not Gambling?
articles.summary: Kalshi has managed to operate as a regulated derivatives exchange while offering markets that look suspiciously like sports betting, raising questions about where exactly the line falls between prediction markets and gambling. Their regulatory gymnastics could determine whether other platforms can follow the same playbook or if regulators will crack down on what they see as betting dressed up in financial market clothing.

articles.title: Polymarket removes nuclear detonation market after backlash
articles.summary: Polymarket pulled its controversial market betting on whether a nuclear weapon would detonate by year-end after facing intense criticism from users and media outlets. The removal highlights how prediction markets still struggle to balance their "bet on anything" ethos with public relations disasters that could trigger regulatory crackdowns.
